title: [WIP] runtime_img: search registries: right trim slashes
body:
Right trim slashes of search registries to avoid double slashes when
looking up images.  Otherwise, registries set to ["foo.com/bar/"] will
ultimately lead to an invalid "foo.com/bar//" reference.

Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <vrothberg@suse.com>

comments.body: @vrothberg Now that container/image has been merged can we move forward with this?

> @vrothberg Now that container/image has been merged can we move forward with this?

If I’m not mistaken, `libpod` just needs to update its containers/image version, and no code change should happen here.

That’s correct. Updating the vendored image lib will suffice. Feel free to
close this PR then. I’m on the phone and hope the reply reaches you.
